title: rubus villicaulis subsp. consobrinus
intro: Rubus villicaulis subsp. consobrinus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry bush, is a species of bramble found primarily in the Himalayas and surrounding regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus villicaulis subsp. consobrinus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
